page: OVHcloud b3-128 is a general-purpose server powered by an AMD EPYC processor utilizing the x86_64 architecture. It features 32 dedicated physical cores and 32 vCPUs, operating at a base clock speed of 2.3 GHz without hyperthreading. The system is equipped with 128 GB of RAM, providing a balanced 4 GB of memory per core. Local storage consists of a 400 GB NVMe SSD, and network connectivity is supported by an 8 Gbps baseline bandwidth.

In benchmark evaluations, the b3-128 demonstrates strong performance, placing in the top 25% for both single-core and multi-core stress-ng tests. Its memory subsystem exhibits high throughput, with read-only cached small block bandwidth reaching 4737.01 GB/sec and large block uncached write speeds at 145.9 GB/sec. The server also excels in database operations, scoring in the top tier for Passmark database tests and achieving 74.67 million operations per second in Redis SET benchmarks. Single-threaded compression and static web serving throughput perform within the average range.

Given its dedicated CPU allocation, balanced resource ratio, and integrated NVMe storage, the b3-128 offers high resource density and qualitative cost efficiency for workloads requiring consistent compute performance without virtualization overhead. The absence of hyperthreading ensures predictable execution times. This profile makes it highly suitable for database hosting, software compilation, multi-threaded data processing, and general-purpose enterprise applications.
description: The OVHcloud b3-128 is a general-purpose server built on KVM virtualization and powered by an AMD EPYC x86_64 processor. It delivers 32 dedicated physical cores (32 vCPUs) running at 2.3 GHz with no hyperthreading, paired with 128 GB of RAM and a local 400 GB NVMe SSD. Network performance is anchored by an 8 Gbps baseline bandwidth. In benchmark testing, the b3-128 shows strong capabilities, ranking in the top 25% for multi-core processing, software compilation, and database operations, while achieving 74.67 million operations per second in Redis SET tests. Its balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio and dedicated CPU allocation make it a reliable option for multi-threaded data processing, software development pipelines, and database hosting.
og_description: OVHcloud b3-128 is a general-purpose server featuring 32 dedicated AMD EPYC cores, 128 GB RAM, and a 400 GB NVMe SSD. It delivers strong database, multi-core processing, and Redis performance.
meta_description: OVHcloud b3-128 is a general-purpose server with 32 dedicated AMD EPYC cores, 128 GB RAM, and a 400 GB NVMe SSD for database and multi-core workloads.
tagline: A dedicated 32-core AMD EPYC server with balanced memory and fast NVMe storage for predictable database and multi-threaded workloads.
bullet_points: 32 dedicated AMD EPYC physical cores with no hyperthreading
128 GB RAM providing a balanced 4 GB per core ratio
400 GB local NVMe SSD storage and 8 Gbps baseline bandwidth
Strong multi-core performance and high-speed Redis operations
Well-suited for database hosting, software compilation, and data processing
